mainEntity.name: What is a QR code generator?

acceptedAnswer.text: A QR code generator is an online tool that creates QR codes for websites, text, email, phone numbers, SMS messages, WiFi details and other data.
QRCodeBarn is free to use for creating simple QR codes online.

mainEntity.name: Do I need to sign up?

acceptedAnswer.text: No signup is needed to create simple QR codes with QRCodeBarn.

mainEntity.name: Can I create a WiFi QR code?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, QRCodeBarn can create WiFi QR codes when you enter the network details in the correct format.

mainEntity.name: Should I test my QR code before printing?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Always test QR codes on at least two devices before printing or publishing them.
